meta.title: Modifier registry
meta.subject: A demo of R3 — three modifiers registered (film/scene/beat) and applied by the cascade before validation.

beats.narration: Three modifiers are registered. The cascade applies them before validation.
Film tier: kicker-prefix sets a default token the renderer can prepend. Scene tier: highlight marks an emphasis. Beat tier: pace-override forces the rhythm.

scenes.heading: What the registry bought
points: Author shorthand — declare intent at the modifier id, let a feature pack do the heavy lifting.
Three tiers: film (FilmMeta), scene (Scene), beat (Beat). Each tier has its own registry map.
Unknown ids are silent. A film that names a modifier no feature registered renders without that modifier — the cascade doesn't trip.

beats.narration: Registry is registered, walked, and stripped before validation.
Multiple features can register modifiers; the registry merges them at engine.use time.
